name: Fried Oysters#2
recipeIngredient: Seasoned flour (flour with a little salt and pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully pick over the oysters and pat them dry with a soft cloth.
2. Roll each oyster in seasoned flour, coating it evenly.
3. Dip the oyster in beaten egg, making sure it's well-coated.
4. Coat the oyster again in bread crumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
5. Fry the oysters golden brown in deep hot fat (375°F/190°C), using a frying basket and no more than 4 at a time.
6. Remove from the fat and drain on crumpled paper toweling.
7. Serve with tartar sauce.
Serves four.
For Philadelphia Fried Oysters:
1. Dip first into mayonnaise, then into bread crumbs.
2. Dip again in beaten egg, followed by more bread crumbs.
3. Fry in hot deep fat until golden brown.
